macro.title: Was the Iran war the final blow in the collapse of Spirit Airlines? - Al Jazeera
macro.summary: The shutdown of the budget airline after 34 years has left 17,000 staff members unemployed.

macro.title: Austrian police detain suspect in case of rat poison found in baby food jars on supermarket shelves - AP News
macro.summary: Police in eastern Austria say a 39-year-old suspect has been arrested after rat poison turned up in some HiPP baby food jars on supermarket shelves in central Europe. The company recalled some of its baby food in Austria, the Czech Republic and Slovakia after…

macro.title: My mom paid $200,000 to build an addition onto my home and moved in. It's paid off in unexpected ways. - Business Insider
macro.summary: My mom built an addition onto my house so she could live with us and remain independent. Our multigenerational setup even boosted our home's value.

macro.title: Greg Abel rules out Berkshire break-up, stresses continuity with Buffett's legacy at annual meeting - CNBC
macro.summary: New CEO Greg Abel did most of the talking at his first Berkshire Hathaway shareholders meeting, but Warren Buffett was still a major presence.
